introSection: 4 Ring Roller Coaster (Chinese: 四环过山车) is a steel roller coaster located at Taolin Happy World in Yangquan, Shanxi, China.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This roller coaster uses the Arrow Dynamics-style track system.

fullText:
4 Ring Roller Coaster (Chinese: 四环过山车) is a steel roller coaster located at Taolin Happy World in Yangquan, Shanxi, China.

This roller coaster uses the Arrow Dynamics-style track system.




 * Blog post on Vertical Horizons (Wayback Machine)
 * A page containing a construction photograph of the roller coaster (Wayback Machine)
